# Nekocode API Gateway Documentation

> Unofficial documentation and tools for Nekocode — unified AI gateway for Anthropic Claude and OpenAI GPT models.

Website: https://nekocode.app
Status: https://status.nekocode.app
Telegram: https://t.me/nekocode_app
Author: Bakhtier Sizhaev (@bakhtiersizhaev)
Updated: 2026-03-24

## Docs

- [Quick Start](docs/quickstart.md): Registration, API key, first config
- [Channels](docs/channels.md): Alpha (x0.3), Spark (x1), Delta
- [Gateways](docs/gateways.md): Default, Russia, Russia 2, Russia 3
- [Switching & Reverting](docs/switching.md): Switch to/from Nekocode for all tools
- [Anthropic Models](docs/models/anthropic.md): Claude Opus/Sonnet/Haiku pricing
- [OpenAI Models](docs/models/openai.md): GPT-5.x pricing
- [Alpha Pricing](docs/pricing/alpha.md): x0.3 multiplier full table
- [Spark Pricing](docs/pricing/spark.md): x1 multiplier + 1M context
- [Status](docs/status.md): Uptime, monitoring, Telegram
- [Troubleshooting](docs/troubleshooting.md): Common errors and fixes

## Integrations

- [Claude Code](docs/integrations/claude-code.md)
- [Codex CLI](docs/integrations/codex-cli.md)
- [OpenCode](docs/integrations/opencode.md)
- [OpenClaw](docs/integrations/openclaw.md)
- [Cursor](docs/integrations/cursor.md)
- [Aider](docs/integrations/aider.md)
- [Windsurf](docs/integrations/windsurf.md)
- [Continue.dev](docs/integrations/continue-dev.md)
- [Anthropic SDK](docs/integrations/anthropic-sdk.md)
- [cURL](docs/integrations/curl.md)
- [Custom Projects](docs/integrations/custom.md)
